message:
test(termwiz): expand from 52 to 176 tests across lineedit, keymap, readbuf, error, and caps (wa-224p0)

Add comprehensive unit tests for 5 previously-untested modules:
- lineedit/buffer.rs: 32 tests (construction, insert, kill, movement, Unicode)
- lineedit/history.rs: 22 tests (BasicHistory, SearchStyle, SearchDirection, search)
- readbuf.rs: 13 tests (extend, advance, find_subsequence)
- error.rs: 20 tests (Error/InternalError, From conversions, Context trait, macros)

Expand existing test suites:
- keymap.rs: +11 tests (Default, overwrite, edge cases, Clone, Found equality)
- caps/mod.rs: +26 tests (ProbeHints overrides, defaults, version_ge, ColorLevel)

Fix pre-existing clippy warnings:
- needless_return: remove explicit returns in buffer.rs
- from_over_into: convert impl Into<Change> to impl From<OutputElement> in host.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
